title: facelis retusa subsp. patula
intro: Facelis retusa subsp. patula, also known as Patula Prickly Poppy or Patula Poppy, is a subspecies of plant in the family Asteraceae, characterized by its distinctive prickly leaves and showy yellow flowers. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its ability to treat skin irritations, wounds, and respiratory issues due to its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Facelis retusa subsp. patula include its potential to reduce inflammation, soothe digestive issues, and alleviate symptoms of colds and flu. Herbal preparations of the plant, such as infusions and salves, have been used to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health conditions.
